item.title: Cyber Threat, Archive Breach And Digital Supremacy
item.description: TRANSKRIP PRENSENTASI 12 Juni 2021, Bukittingi, Sumatra Barat Subjek Informasi Tema : Cyber Threat, Archive Breach and Digital Supremacy Event : GLAM Seminar Series Fakultas Adab dan Humaniora UIN Jakarta Tanggal : 17 Juni 2021 SLIDE 1 – Bismillahirrahmanirrahim.
